stories.headline: SuperInfer optimizes large language model inference on superchips with rotary scheduling
synopsis: SuperInfer achieves 30% reduction in latency for large language model inference on superchips.
The technology has the potential to improve the efficiency of AI processing in data centers.
Further research is needed to integrate SuperInfer with existing AI systems.
stories.explanation: Imagine a traffic light system for AI processing, SuperInfer is like a smart traffic light that optimizes the flow of data.
